headline: Zoetis' Acquisition of Neogen Genomics Business Faces Regulatory Scrutiny in Australia
summary: The Australian agency is conducting a Phase 2 assessment of Zoetis' $160 million acquisition of Neogen's genomics unit due to competition concerns.

raw.headline: Zoetis' Acquisition of Neogen Genomics Business Faces Regulatory Scrutiny in Australia
raw.summary: The Australian agency is conducting a Phase 2 assessment of Zoetis' $160 million acquisition of Neogen's genomics unit due to competition concerns.

headline: Zoetis: An Attractive Risk-Reward Opportunity
summary: We have long viewed Zoetis as one of the highest-quality businesses in healthcare, and the company has generally been valued accordingly.
